resources.string: AuroraSMS
Make AuroraSMS the SMS app
Grant messaging permissions
Notifications can show a generic alert, sender only, or sender and message. You can change this privacy level later.
Enable message notifications
Open local diagnostics
AuroraSMS needs your explicit approval before it can become the default SMS app.
Waiting for the Android role decision.
AuroraSMS is the current default SMS app.
The role request was cancelled. Messaging remains unchanged.
This device does not report SMS telephony support.
This Android build does not report the required messaging capability.
Android does not currently offer the SMS role on this device.
Messaging permissions granted: %1$d of %2$d
New message
This compose request is missing a valid SMS or MMS recipient.
Recipient
Message
Send unavailable in this foundation build
Conversation %1$d
This notification reached the exact local conversation. Full history presentation arrives with the bounded conversation UI phase.
Back
